---
title: "trend_analysis"
author: "Dana Lanceman"
date: "10/1/2021"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r cars}
library(Kendall)



TS.Dis <- ts(data$Dis[1:30], 1983, 2012)


```


```{r waterbird}
DAT <- read.csv("C:/Users/danal/UNSW/Great Cumbung Swamp - General/Rcode/sample_data.csv")

M1 <- glm(Waterbird ~ Ln.Dis, data=DAT, family = poisson())
summary(M1)
M1 <- glm(Ln.Waterbird ~ Ln.Dis, data=DAT)
summary(M1)

plot(DAT$Ln.Waterbird, DAT$Ln.Dis)
```



```{r}
MannKendall
```
